CustomField.description: Execution phase for non-DML work items (EVENT, EMAIL, NOTIFICATION, FLOW). Values: PRE_DML, POST_DML, ON_SUCCESS, ON_FAILURE, ON_FINALIZATION.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Execution phase for non-DML work items (EVENT, EMAIL, NOTIFICATION, FLOW). Values: PRE_DML, POST_DML, ON_SUCCESS, ON_FAILURE, ON_FINALIZATION.
CustomField.label: Execution Phase
